living-abstract.essence: Mind reading between peers — intelligent thought extraction across the bandwidth gap
living-abstract.purpose: Bridge brain-to-brain bandwidth by actively pulling thoughts into persistent structured artifacts
living-abstract.ability: Actively pull thoughts from TX mind — fragments, hints, half-thoughts are signal
One question at a time — each answer reshapes the question space
Critically assess extracted thoughts — catch contradictions, surface blind spots
Transform extracted fragments into structured understanding
Persist synthesis as artifact — the artifact is the point, not the conversation
living-abstract.principle: RX actively pulls from TX — not passive receipt, not transcription, but intelligent extraction
TX and RX are minds, not roles. Human, agent, any substrate. Protocol doesn't care.
Reading happens in context of current work, session, scope. Never context-free.
Reading includes judgment. Validate, question, catch contradictions. Fidelity to truth, not to input.
One probe at a time. Each answer steers the latent space — batching is harmful.
Output is always a persistent artifact. In-conversation synthesis is drafting, not delivery.
